headline: AvalonBay Communities Inc (NYSE:AVB) Q1 Earnings Meet Core FFO Estimates as Revenue and EPS Guidance Offer Mixed Signals
summary: AvalonBay Q1 Core FFO met estimates at $2.83, but weak Q2 guidance and rising expenses signal near-term headwinds amid solid same-store revenue growth.

headline: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. Provides Q1 2026 Results, Q2 2026 Guidance, Reaffirms Full Year Core FFO and FFO Outlook, Updates EPS Outlook
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., April 27, 2026--AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) (the "Company") reported Earnings per Share – diluted ("EPS"), Funds from Operations attributable to common stockholders - diluted ("FFO") per share and Core FFO per share (as defined in this release) for the three months ended March 31, 2026 and 2025 as detailed below.
